descriptions.text: An action RPG for the Nintendo Entertainment System, serving as a prequel and origin story of the Jim & Dill game series.

A prequel to Jim & Dill - The Legend of Weed N' Stiff, and Jim & Dill 2 - Bobson's Revenge.

Take control of Jim Weed and Dill Stiff in this origin story about the band that saved rock & roll forever. Meet new and familiar characters as you form the band, make a demo tape, get a manager, and rise to fame over the universally-loathed band Moo Cow and their singer: Joe Bobson.

Arcade City is your home, and you seek the Legendary Studio... known for crafting rock stars. Joe Bobson has been searching for this studio his entire life.

Traverse the countryside and uncover the history of Joe Bobson and the Bobson family as you strive to find the path to rock & roll royalty.
